chapters.text: Nin’eveh khopi chung chang thudola thu kiphong. Elkosh khoa mi Nahum kitipan themgao thilmu banga thil amu kisutna lekhabu.
Pakai hi Pathen tom ngaitah Phulah a jong hat tah ahi Pakai hin phu alajin, Lungjong alungsa jin ahi; Akidoupite chunga Pakaiyin phu alajin, Amelmate din lungsatna anei jinge.

Pakai hi lung hangvah lou Thahat tah ahin, Ajeh beiya Pakaiyin themmona hi mohseh a angaidam lou ding ahi. Pakai hi chimpei le khopi huiya alamlhan, Meilhang jouse jong hi akengphanga leivui jeng ahi.
Twikhanglen jong aphoa ahileh Twi akanghel jitan, Vadung jouse abonchan atingkang soh hel jie; Bashan phai le Carmel mol jong Agop lhasoh hel ji lhonin, Lebanon lhang noulai jong agop jitai.
Pakai masanga molsang jouse jong akihot lingsoh jin, Thinglhang gam jouse jong ajolsohin ahi; Pakai angsunga leiset jong ahomkeovin akijamin, Vannoi pumpi le asunga chengte ahomkeovin aum jiuve.
Pakai lunghan masanga koiham ading jou ding? Alunghan deije ju chu kon athoh jou ding ham? Alungsat chu mei-al kisung lha bangin akisung lhan, Songpi jouse jong hi Pakai jeh-in apoh keh sohjie.
Pakai hi anun nemin, Genthei hesoh nikhoa kiselna kulpi ahi; Akoma kiselji mihem ho chu Pakaiyin ahesoh keiye.
Akidoupite vang chu Twisoh hat tah letjeng junga hung long chu Atolmang sah hel ding, Amelmate jong chu muthim khojing lah a adellut ding ahi.
Ipi dinga Pakai douna thil nagonu ham? Pakaiyin achaina hel’a asuh beihel ding ahi; Akisatpite chunga chu Nivei pansa phu alah lou ding khatveiya achaihel ding ahi.
Akisatpite chu lingle khao kihei lhop bang a amangthah ahiuvin, changpol gosa banga mangthah ahitauve.
Pakai douna thilse ngaitoa pang, Hangtah a thumop jipa, nanga kona mi khatbeh hungdoh lou ham ong?
Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: “Amaho hi thahat’u hen lang mijat tam ujongleh Abonchauva kisatgam’uva kitolmang del diu ahi. Nang vang nabolgenthei jong leng naboldenthei kit taponge.
Chule tua ama namkol napoh chu kaloi lhah peh ding, Nakikanna jouse jong kabotansoh hel ding ahi,” ati.

Nangma chung chang thudol’a Pakaiyin thu a pen, Namin puding cha le nao hung peng kit lou ding ahitai; Pathen lim nasemthu nahouina kona milim kilhajol jouse le kikhengjol jouse kapaidoh ding, Nangma kivuina ding lhankhuh, Jum le ja dimset’a kasempeh ding nahi.” ati.

Vetan, molsang chung dunga Kipana thupha polea chamna thu lhangsampa Kengphang teni khu! Vo Judah, nakut bol ding jouse kibol’in kakitepna bulhit tan, Ajeh chu nahenga mgiloupa hung kit lou ding ahitan, Ama chu beihel’a kilha kisumang ahitai.
Nang to kidou din misu mangpa ahungin, Pasal pha pha kulpia pansah-in lang lampi vephan; Nakong kigah-in lang Natha neichasun in pang phan.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Israel lal loupina banga Jacob lal loupina jong asemphat ding ahi; Michomgama pang hon achom agimsel’uva Ahalsi sia asuh manguva amonsa alupsah-u ahitai.

Asepai gal-hat ho chu alumu asan soh keiyin, Asepaiten abonchauvin pon san-ao akisil cheh-uve. Kangtalai jouse jong meisi bangin apah lah lah-in, Galsat dia akigoltoh tengu leh akipat kal’u angah lel’ui.
Kholai dunga kangtalai jouse akihon lullul’un, Veng ningkoi dung jousea asuh lhai atop lhaiyui; Meikong kidevah bangin achanthe thu’uvin, Kolphe bangin aphelap lap’uve.
Vaibol’a pang ho akoukhom’uvin, Ache nauva akipal lhusoh tauve; Pal phung lam adel loiyun, Asangkholchol’u akihohdoh-in alengdep dop’e.
Vadung kelkot phung jouse akihongsoh tan, Leng inpia mite alung thoisoh tauve.
Lengnu avon asut lhauvin akai mang tauve, Ajenlea pang nu-ngah ho akap kap’uvin Vahuite ham athouvin amaoset sot’un, Adip achum chum jenguvin ahi.
Nin’eveh khopi hi twikullentah hiya Asunga twi jouse long kanghel tobang ahitai. “Kho ngaiyin! Kho ngaiyin !” tin Mihon asam sam jenguvin, koimacha la akinung heipoi.
Dangka kichom’uvin lang Sana jong kichom’uvin! Thil kikhol ho hi chomjou tih aumtapon, Gou hijat thil manlu ho jong hi abei thei tapoi.
Chom’uvin lang chom ngimhel’un ahomsan koiyun! Mi lungthim alha lhop soh tan mi khupbuh jouse akithing soh hel tai, Mihem jouse akong akhasoh-in, Mi mai jouse ad up soh hel tai!
Sakei bahkaiho kihenna hong chu hoilai hiya, Sakei bahkai noute kihenna akosung chu hoilai ham? Sakei bahkaiten aneh diu sa akipoh lut’uva Asuphong ding beihel’a anoute toh aneh nau chu hoilai hitam?
Sakei bahkaipin anoute ding kham bep akithan, Sakei bahkaipan jong api dingin sahing phabep akoiye; Akosung jong chu sahing athasa adimset’in, Ahongsung sahing botelsa adimset’e.

Thaneipen Pakai chun aseiyin, vetan, keima nang dou din kapange, nakangtalai jouse kahalvama, ameikhu akitunglet lut ding; chujongleh nasakei bahkai noute jong chemjama katha ding ahi; leiset chunga kona nakivahna ding sahing jouse katoldoh ding, nasottollea pang miho thusei ogin kijapha louhel ding ahi.
Ohe ada nahi, thisan dimset khopi, Jou le nal dimset’a mithil kichom jeng dimset, Min nachom ngah tih neilouva Angahna beiya naum ding ahitai!
Sakol kijep gin, Kangtalai kitah gin, Sakol kinunkho gin leh Kangtalai kipei gin pi khu!

Sakol touthemhon adelkhum khum’uvin, Chemjam kol aval lah lah jengin, Tengkol jong apah lah lah jenge; Sepaite akithatsa ho Thilong alhuh lhuh-in akisen, Mihem long simjou louvin alumin achunga miho akipallhu lhu jengui!

Thilsoh hijatpi hi notinu notia apana Achon chatvai jeh a soh ahin, Lungset set’a umdoh a Thina thei theiya kiheidoh ahitai; Notia pang chun notia apanna jeh a Namtin vaipi geiya apui chatvaiya Deichat chat’a akisemna jeh a chu Mitin vaipi geiya apui chatvaisoh ahitai.

Thaneipen Pakaiyin aseiyin, Vetan, keiman nang kadou nahi; Nanih chol chen jong chu Namaichang geiya kahodoh peh ding nahi; Chutengleh namtin vaipi hi Nasagoh keova pi chu kavetsah a Lenggam jouse hin Najaimopi chu amusoh kei diu ahi.
Keiman nang hi bonlhoh kase khum ding, Muset set dia kabol’a, vet vet dia kaumsah ding nahi.
Koi koi hileh namupha jouse chu kinleu diu Nin’eveh khopi hi akeohel’a kijam ahitai, Kon aka ding hitam? Alhembi dinga alungmonna ding koi kaholpeh ding ham? tia asei ding ahi.
Nile vadung panga chenga Akimvela twipi veikol soh hel, Twikhanglen pal banga neiya Twipi banga nei No-amon mite sanga phajo nahim?
Ethiopia chu akihatsahna anahin, Angahna bei Egypt jong akihatsahna ahi; Put khopi le Libya mite jong Akithopia anapangji ahiuve.

Hijongleh min apoh mang ahitan, Sohchang dia che ahitai; Achasen jouse akicholgoi soh tan, Thingphung telchan’a akivogoisoh tauve; Akhopi sunga migun ja umtah tah jong Min vang asan’uvin akihom tauve; Khopi sunga mi thahat lai jouse jong Thih khaovin akihensoh tai.
Nangjong ju nakham ding, Namit kisucho ding, Melmaa kona hoidohna dia Nangin kiselna ding nahol ding ahi.
Nakulpi jouse jong theichang phung bep ahin, Theichang ga masa tobanga akiho lhah leh anenompa kamsunga lenglut jeng ahi.
Vetan, nasepaiya pang ho jong Nakho lailunga numei jeng ahitai. Nakidoupite din nagamsunga kelkot jouse Lentah tah-in akihongdoh soh tai; Nakelkotgol jouse jong hi Meiyin akahvam soh hel ahitai.
Kho ki-umna dingin twi gathal loiyin, Nakulpi jouse kikaidet loiyin; Bonlhoh lah a lenglut jengin Changpol chilgoiyin, cheh deng loiyin.

Meiyin namoh kahvam theiyin tin, Chemjamin naveutan thei ding ahi; Khaokhote kithat gam banga Nathadoh jeng thei ahi. Nangho le nangho khaokhote jat’in kisem’uvin lang Khaosut te bangin ki punsah jenguvin!
Namite kiveiho chu punsah jingin, Vana ahisite sangin tamsah loiyin; Khaokhoten alha ajah jiuvin Aleng mangloiji tauve.
Namilen namilalte jong khaosut te beh ahiuvin, Nadanthu lekha themho jong hi meibol nikhoa pal dunga khaokhote jinglei loiya toubep ahiuve.
Vo Assyria lengpa Nakelngoi ching ho aihmu soh tauve; Namilen namilalte jong Akitalsoh tauvin ahi. Namite jong molsang chung dung jousea akithe thangsoh-uvin, Akoukhom ding koimacha aumtapoi.

Namaha nasilnem peh ding koima aumpon, Natina lai lah amelse behseh jengin ahi; Nachung chang thudol japha chan Akipah uvin akhut abeng beng jengun ahi. Ajeh chu tang louhela thilse nabol, Koipen chunga hung lhung khalouva um kham?
